tagline: Empowering farmers and nourishing the nation

seo.metaTitle: Kano Dairy Cooperative Federation | Dairy Suppliers & Cooperative Organization in Kano
seo.metaDescription: Kano Dairy Cooperative Federation (KDCF) is a cooperative dairy supplier in Kano, Nigeria—supporting farmers with milk value chain services, dairy supplies, logistics, investments and animal health consultations.
